summary: Workflow structure sound (pinned actions, least-privilege perms), but artifact-cleanup.sh lacks numeric input validation (MAX_AGE_DAYS, MAX_TOTAL_SIZE, KEEP_LATEST treated as strings). Workflow has repetitive test steps (lines 37–59, 61–85, 87–105) duplicating temp-dir setup/cleanup that should be factored into helper. run-act-tests.sh only validates 'Job succeeded', not specific output assertions per requirements; max-total-size test checks reclaimed > 0, not exact values. Script logic correct but missing magic-number error handling (999999 in days_since). Integrates actionlint properly but test harness too simplistic for fixture-based parameterized cases.
